prompt: Based on the clear lifestyle photos of two adult individuals uploaded by the user, generate high-budget wedding photography in an 'Extravagant Midnight Party' style. Strictly preserve the original identity characteristics of both people, including face shape, feature proportions, eyes, nose, lips, skin tone, age, hairline, hair base, body proportions, and overall temperament. The results must clearly appear to be the same real couple without becoming strangers, overly Westernized, overly 'Internet celebrity'-like, or showing AI-generated fake faces. Use the uploaded photos only as identity references; do not retain the original background, clothing, poses, props, or scenes. Create a brand new haute couture wedding portrait. ## Theme and Atmosphere Overall theme: Extravagant, midnight party, wedding after-party, high-end wedding editorial, champagne celebration, high-society party vibes, cinematic wedding masterpiece. The visuals should have the quality of an 'ultra-high budget' shoot: High-end custom set design, exquisite props, professional studio lighting, fashion magazine aesthetic, and movie-poster atmosphere—not ordinary or cheap studio style. ## Scene and Setting Luxury wedding party venue with consistent themes across corners: Cream-white, champagne, or cream-grey draped backdrops; dark wood walls or vintage club spaces; champagne towers, vintage goblets, wedding cakes, candles, silver/gold tablecloths, and champagne bottles; gold/silver confetti and sequins; sharp light sources, warm gold rim lighting, and slight lens flare. Palette: Black, white, ivory, champagne gold, warm brown, and cream grey. Low saturation but expensive, glossy, and layered. ## Styling Groom: Black haute couture tuxedo/suit, white shirt, black bowtie, sharp fit, and a mature, aristocratic aura. Bride: Haute couture white/ivory gown (strapless fishtail, structured corset, or lace), high-end statement earrings, and an elegant after-party look. ## Hairstyle and Makeup Formal upgrades based on original hair length and volume. Bride's makeup: Exquisite 'Old Money' evening look, creamy base, defined contouring, champagne gold/warm brown eyes, and rose/red-brown lips. Groom's makeup: Clean skin and clear facial contours. ## Relationship and Emotion Emphasize intimacy, shared excitement, relaxed after-party indulgence, and cinematic tension. Expressions should vary: laughing, relaxed smiles, seductive/confident looks, intimate proximity, or quiet gazes. ## Capture Style and Camera Work Emphasize 'captured moments': actions in progress, expanding smiles, toasts, and falling confetti. Composition variety: close-ups, half-body, 3/4 body, full body, low angles, foreground bokeh, and depth. ## Proportions and Structural Control Ensure natural facial and body proportions and realistic head-to-body ratios. Contact between characters (hugging, dancing, holding hands) must be natural without clipping or distorted limbs. ## Output Requirements A high-completion, 3:4 vertical composition portrait like a final selection from an ultra-high budget studio. Prompt 01: Leaning in for a kiss (Main Poster). Groom in tuxedo holding a goblet and supporting the bride as she leans back in falling confetti, inches away from a kiss. Prompt 02: Laughing at the cake table. A festive scene with a wedding cake and champagne; relaxed and celebratory. Prompt 03: Raising a glass. Groom holding a glass towards the lens in the foreground, bride in the background by a champagne tower, inviting the viewer into the party. Prompt 04: Whispering in ear. Intimate close-up of the groom whispering to the bride as she smiles coquettishly. Prompt 05: Glances through the glass. Magazine-style layering with the groom in the foreground and the bride in the background looking through the glass with a nocturnal gaze. Prompt 06: Dancing in confetti. Dynamic full-body shot of the couple dancing freely in the after-party ballroom. Prompt 07: Playful cake shot. The couple showing off the wedding cake with playful, high-end expressions. Prompt 08: Cold and elegant finale. A high-fashion closure shot against a dark wall; stately, expensive, and atmospheric.
